articles.title: NIKE, Inc. stock (US6541061031): Dividend affirmed as analysts downgrade outlook
articles.summary: NIKE, Inc. has affirmed its quarterly dividend at $0.41 per share despite recent analyst downgrades and ongoing revenue pressure, particularly in North America. The company faces challenges including weaker athletic footwear demand, softened direct and digital sales, and a shift towards lower-margin wholesale channels, leading to a 19% stock decline over the past year. Investors are advised to monitor quarterly results, margin trends, and regional demand as key indicators.
